title: East Boston man indicted on federal gun charges, including possession of a machine gun
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News Prosecutors say that ghost guns, conversion devices, and a 3D printer were seized in a search of Angel Negron’s Eastie apartment.

Police say they found three privately made firearms (ghost guns), four machine gun conversion devices, a 3D printer, five magazines and 31 privately made firearm receivers during the search of an East Boston apartment.
Courtesy/U.

title: The 2025-26 Boston Bruins exceeded expectations. But they’ve got a lot of work to do.

title: Bruins’ Nikita Zadorov reveals he was playing through a serious knee injury in playoffs
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins "Fully torn off the bone.

title: Jarren Duran’s 3-run homer brings life back into outfielder, Red Sox
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Red Sox Duran was just looking for an RBI when he stepped into the batter's box in the third inning.
But the home run was a welcome sight.
Jarren Duran got a curveball he could handle and sent it over the right field wall Friday night.

title: Red Sox starting pitcher Jake Bennett offers solid outing in MLB debut vs. Astros
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Boston Red Sox “It was just an unreal experience.
… It’s a dream come true.
” 25-year-old Jake Bennett pitched in place of the injured Garrett Crochet Friday.

title: Thousands rally in Boston against billionaires on May Day
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News Labor and immigrant rights groups lead citywide demonstrations calling for economic and workplace reforms.
Mayor Michelle Wu speaks at the May Day rally in Boston.

Courtesy Thousands of demonstrators took part in May Day rallies in Boston on Friday, joining an international day of action focused on workers’ rights, immigration protections, and economic inequality.
